untranslatable_reason: Signal requires spread forecasting and option strike positioning logic that cannot be expressed using price-based technical indicators. The core decision depends on trader's subjective forecast of spread maximum and strike placement relative to that forecast—neither of which are observable market data or standard technical indicators. Options pricing and spread analysis require domain-specific calculations not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally about options strategy and spread forecasting (Natenberg spread options framework). It requires: (1) a forecast of future spread maximum value, (2) strike price positioning logic, and (3) comparison of current spread to projected maximum. These are trader judgments and options parameters, not technical indicators. A generic proxy using trend confirmation (price > SMA) was provided as a fallback, but does not capture the essence of the signal which is directional sentiment on spread widening combined with intentional strike selection below projected max to capture intrinsic value.
